chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 328 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.5343/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.5344/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.5345/2025 (R/Surety) 07.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Abdul Shakoor, Javed Ali and Shakeel Ahmed were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 21.04.2025, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing three original defence savings certificates of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 08.09.2025. Subsequently, the accused have been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 13.09.2025, annexed with this application. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
